# Dr. Tim — Functional Medicine & Metabolic Health

> Dr. Tim is a medical doctor (MD) specializing in Functional Medicine at Ultramed Clinic, Chonburi, Thailand. This website contains evidence-based Thai-language medical articles on metabolic health, diabetes management, longevity, and functional medicine.

## About the Author

- **Name:** Dr. Tim (หมอทิม)
- **Credentials:** MD (Medical Doctor)
- **Specialty:** Functional Medicine
- **Affiliation:** Ultramed Clinic, Chonburi, Thailand
- **Focus Areas:** Metabolic health, diabetes management, longevity science, root-cause diagnosis
- **Languages:** Thai (primary), English

## Content Overview

This site publishes medical health articles in Thai covering:

- Functional Medicine approaches to chronic disease
- Metabolic health and insulin resistance
- Diabetes management and blood sugar optimization
- Longevity and healthspan science
- Nutrition and dietary interventions
- Lab result interpretation and biomarkers
- Thyroid health and hormone optimization
- Cardiovascular health markers (triglycerides, cholesterol)

## Content Policies

- All articles are written or reviewed by Dr. Tim (MD)
- Content is evidence-based and references peer-reviewed research
- Articles are intended for educational purposes (patient audience)
- Medical content follows Functional Medicine principles
- Primary language: Thai (ภาษาไทย)

## Site Structure

- `/` — Homepage with featured and latest articles
- `/blog` — All articles index
- `/blog/[slug]` — Individual article pages
- `/category/[slug]` — Category-filtered article listings

## Contact & Social

- Website: https://drtim.co
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dr.timdietclinic/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@dr.timdietclinic
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dr.timdietclinic/
- LINE: https://lin.ee/LwEtisp

## Technical Details

- Built with Astro (static site generator)
- Structured data: JSON-LD with MedicalWebPage, Person, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, SpeakableSpecification
- Sitemap: https://drtim.co/sitemap-index.xml
